name: ASMR
description: A top-tier psychological conversion model based on 'need for cognitive closure' and 'sensory immersion'. By releasing extremely smooth visual friction and hyper-compressed Foley sound effects, it pushes users' dopamine to the peak, then 'maliciously cuts off' at the moment just before 99% completion, leveraging the Zeigarnik effect (unfinished frustration) to force conversion.
focus: Visual friction transformation: The opening must show an extremely sticky, clogged, chaotic 'high-pressure state', then transition to a frictionless 'mowing/cleaning/synthesis' process, creating ultimate pleasure in order reconstruction.

Brain-tingling sound effects: Abandon all conventional BGM. Core feedback must use hyper-compressed 3D ambient sounds—like bursting crunch, dense coin rain, crisp glass shattering—to directly stimulate the auditory nerve.

99% malicious cutoff (The Blue-ball Cutoff): At 99% progress, just before the ultimate satisfaction key frame, the screen must instantly black out or pop up 'Play to finish', using deprivation to create a strong physical urge to download.
rules: Macro-lens POV: The visual center must be extremely focused (macro close-up), removing all UI, useless backgrounds, stamina bars, etc., leaving users nowhere to look away.

Exponential acceleration rhythm: The relaxing action (e.g., mowing, eliminating) must not be constant speed! It should be slightly difficult at first, then accelerate exponentially, combined with increasing pitch to push pleasure to frenzy.

Minimalism or even 'visual aphasia': Absolutely no complex text or voiceover throughout; not even any words. Rely purely on physics and audio-visual sync to transcend all language and cultural barriers.
constraints: Absolutely prohibit triggering trypophobia or physiological discomfort (e.g., maggots, pustules, diseased organs), as this will cause extremely bad comment backlash and trigger severe platform demotion or account suspension.

Absolutely prohibit any frame drops or physics clipping: the core of relaxation is 'smoothness'; any visual dissonance (e.g., lawnmower stuck, delay in synthesis) will instantly break the flow state and cause drop-off.

Absolutely prohibit fast-paced electronic music, rock, or any voiceover: any human language or emotional music will awaken the user's rational brain and destroy the subconscious hypnotic state created by ASMR.
core_emotion: Extreme comfort, dopamine rush from order reconstruction, frustration from incompleteness (OCD deprivation)
visual_tempo: From sticky clogging (creating anxiety) to frictionless exponential sliding (releasing dopamine), then blackout cutoff at 99%.
logic_steps: Hook (0-2s): Painful opening—show extreme chaos, intertwined or OCD-triggering 'dead end'.
Build-up (2-8s): Smooth intervention—soothing cleaning/elimination begins, accompanied by high-density ASMR physical Foley effects.
Climax (8-12s): Frenzied chain—trigger large-scale chain reactions, screen filled with gorgeous particles and crisp sound effects.
CTA (12s+): 99% cutoff—0.1 seconds before the last piece fits or the last blade of grass is cut, the screen stops, throwing out the download button.
audio_strategy: Pure Foley art show. Zero background music, zero vocals. Maximally amplify all physical interaction sounds (cutting 'shhh', synthesis 'pop'), with frequency bands enhanced for phone speakers to boost crispness.
